title: Harry Styles opens up about impact of Liam Payne's death
description: The singer revealed the impact of losing his former bandmate while discussing his upcoming album.
content:
Harry Styles has said the death of his former One Direction bandmate Liam Payne caused him to relook at his life.

title: Andy Burnham criticises ‘bankruptcy’ of Labour approach to campaigning
description: Greater Manchester mayor rekindles leadership speculation with speech addressing party’s byelection loss
content:
Andy Burnham has reignited hostilities with Keir Starmer’s Labour leadership, criticising what he described as the “bankruptcy” of the party’s approach to campaigning, a week after it lost the previously safe seat of Gorton and Denton.

title: Family of Barnsley rabies victim say death was "traumatic"
description: Yvonne Ford's daughter tells an inquest they do not want another family to endure the same loss.
content:
The family of a grandmother who died from rabies have told an inquest they were determined her death would "not be without meaning".
Yvonne Ford, 59, from Barnsley, died four months after she was scratched by a stray dog she startled under her sun lo... [2871 chars]

title: Dozens of arrests as police seize weapons, drugs, cash and luxury goods in raids targeting drug supply in Liverpool
description: Hundreds of officers conducted warrants, roadside checks and land searches in the Anfield area of the city as Operation Vanguard targeted properties suspected of being connected to the supply of drugs.
content:
The 7am wake-up call on Stanley Road in Liverpool came courtesy of the screech of a police angle-grinder and a shower of sparks.
As officers cut their way through a heavy metal gate, sleepy faces peered from behind curtains in neighbouring houses.

title: Man charged with attempted murder after Edinburgh knife incident
description: The 23-year-old appeared at Edinburgh Sheriff Court in private, made no plea and was remanded in custody.
content:
A man has appeared in court charged with attempting to murder two people and assaulting two others to the danger of their life, during an incident in Edinburgh on Monday.
